data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for pausing/canceling lifecycle and grace windows.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement regarding pausing/canceling lifecycle and grace windows. However, the provided evidence does not include any specific details or endpoints that confirm this behavior. As a result, it is not possible to assert whether the requirement is satisfied or if there is a gap in the implementation.
gaps: No evidence of pausing/canceling lifecycle and grace windows.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the pausing/canceling lifecycle and grace windows.
